resultList.dtldesc: This 4 BHK apartment in Hulimavu offers an expansive and luxurious living experience within one of South Bangalores most established residential corridors. Designed for those who seek a blend of grand proportions and modern aesthetics, this residence provides a sophisticated sanctuary with easy access to the citys major IT hubs and commercial centres.Property SpecificationsThe residence spans a vast super area of 3,595 sq. ft and is positioned on the 10th floor of a 12-storey tower, ensuring exceptional natural light and panoramic views of the surrounding greenery. The interior layout is meticulously structured to include four spacious bedrooms and four well-appointed bathrooms, offering maximum privacy for all family members. The grand living and dining areas flow seamlessly into four private balconies, providing multiple vantage points and excellent cross-ventilation. The property is offered in a semi-furnished condition, featuring premium flooring and contemporary fixtures that serve as an elegant foundation for a bespoke home.FacilitiesResidents have access to a comprehensive suite of world-class amenities designed for a premium lifestyle. The complex features a well-equipped gymnasium, a temperature-controlled swimming pool, and dedicated sports facilities including a badminton court and a squash court. For community engagement and leisure, there is an expansive clubhouse, a multipurpose hall, and a mini cinema theatre. Essential services are robust, with 247 security, a sophisticated power backup system, and a consistent water supply. Additional conveniences include three dedicated covered parking spaces, high-speed elevators, and a dedicated kids play area, ensuring a holistic environment for all residents.LocalityIdeally located in Hulimavu, the property enjoys seamless connectivity to Bannerghatta Road and the NICE Ring Road, making commutes to Electronic City and JP Nagar highly efficient. The neighbourhood is well-served by upcoming metro connectivity and a robust public transport network. Reputable educational institutions such as BGS National Public School and IIM Bangalore are in the immediate vicinity. Healthcare needs are met by top-tier facilities like Fortis Hospital and Apollo Hospitals. For shopping and leisure, residents can easily access Royal Meenakshi Mall and various high-street retail hubs, supermarkets, and dining options located within a short drive.
